_meta.author: scorecard-refine-national autopilot
_meta.note: Evidence-finalize TX state-rep batch (Austin/Hays + Bexar): alan-schoolcraft (R HD-44), erin-zwiener (D HD-45), sheryl-cole (D HD-46), vikki-goodwin (D HD-47, now 2026 Lt Gov nominee), donna-howard (D HD-48). Every TRUE/FALSE cited; null where no evidence; party never inferred.

profile.confidence_note: Web-verified 2026-06-19. Returning member: served TX House 1981-1993, won 2024 GOP runoff vs incumbent Kuempel, now serving HD-44 in 89th Leg; won 2026 GOP primary, faces Eric Norman (D) Nov 2026. Scored from Texas Alliance for Life 90% rating, GOA/NRA-PVF endorsements, and his own iVoterGuide questionnaire.

alan-schoolcraft@TX.notes_append: Evidence finalize 2026-06-19: TX House District 44 (Bexar/Guadalupe). Texas Alliance for Life 89th-Leg scorecard 90%; TX Right to Life-endorsed 2024; NRA-PVF + Gun Owners of America endorsed; Texas Home School Coalition + National Border Patrol Council endorsed. iVoterGuide questionnaire: pro-life, marriage one-man-one-woman, biological sex in women's sports, school choice (money-follows-child), parental rights, religious conscience exemptions, opposes ESG/defunding police, photo voter ID, southern-border security. Most issue-specific evidence is his own questionnaire (self-stated); life rating is HARD.

0.note: Texas Alliance for Life 90% (89th Leg); iVoterGuide self-described 100% pro-life.

1.note: Pro-life restrictionist (chemical-abortion safety standards); no evidence of abortion-abolition advocacy.

2.note: No evidence on embryonic stem-cell / IVF discard.

4.note: TX Right to Life-endorsed; no abortion-industry money found.

profile.confidence_note: Web-verified 2026-06-19. Incumbent TX HD-45 (Hays Co.) since 2019; on 2026 Dem primary ballot, faces Tennyson Moreno (R) Nov 2026. Consistent progressive: TX Right to Life 0%, PP Texas Votes-endorsed, LGBTQ Caucus co-founder.

erin-zwiener@TX.notes_append: Evidence finalize 2026-06-19: TX HD-45. TX Right to Life 0% (2019); Planned Parenthood Texas Votes-endorsed. LGBTQ Caucus co-founder/treasurer; HRC + Equality Texas-endorsed; opposed SB 14 (gender-care ban) via point of order. Anti-voucher (amendment banning voucher funds). Authored HB 160 (student ID as voter ID). Freedom Index (John Birch) 17% 2025-26; No on permitless carry HB 1927; argued for red-flag mechanisms; No on border-security appropriations and TX sovereignty measure.

0.note: TX Right to Life 0%; pro-choice, demanded abortion access continue.

1.note: Co-authored amendments to weaken pro-life bills; opposite of abolition.

0.note: Openly bisexual; LGBTQ Caucus co-founder; HRC/Equality Texas-endorsed.

1.note: LGBTQ Caucus leadership; supports same-sex marriage.

2.note: Opposed SB 14 (gender-transition-care ban for minors); raised point of order to kill it.

0.note: Anti-voucher; sponsored 2023 budget amendment banning state funds for private-school vouchers.

1.note: No direct vote on a parental-notification/consent bill.

profile.confidence_note: Web-verified 2026-06-19. Incumbent TX HD-46 (Austin/Travis) since 2019; running for re-election 2026 (GOP primary canceled). Former Austin City Council/Mayor Pro Tem. Consistent progressive; PP Texas Votes-endorsed; LGBTQ Caucus member.

sheryl-cole@TX.notes_append: Evidence finalize 2026-06-19: TX HD-46. TX Right to Life 89th-Leg 54% (no individual pro-life vote identified to explain it; likely procedural). Voted No on SB 8, HB 1280, SB 4 (abortion); sponsored abortion-coverage bills; PP Texas Votes-endorsed; quote 'fighting for a woman's right to abortion.' LGBTQ Caucus member; campaign supports trans bathroom access, opposes 'suppressive Voter ID,' supports sanctuary protections/opposes SB 4, supports background checks/waiting periods (gun control), marijuana legalization/Ban the Box.

0.note: Pro-choice; 'I'll continue fighting for a woman's right to abortion' (2024).

1.note: Voted No on SB 8, HB 1280, SB 4; sponsored abortion-coverage bills.

1.note: Supports closing 'gun show loophole,' background checks (gun-control posture).

profile.confidence_note: Web-verified 2026-06-19. Currently holds TX HD-47; NOT running for HD-47 re-election — won the May 26, 2026 Dem runoff and is the 2026 DEMOCRATIC NOMINEE FOR LIEUTENANT GOVERNOR, facing GOP incumbent Dan Patrick in Nov 2026. Scored on her HD-47 voting record. Consistent progressive (TX Right to Life 0%, NARAL 100%).

vikki-goodwin@TX.notes_append: Evidence finalize 2026-06-19: sitting TX HD-47, now 2026 Lt Gov nominee (running_higher_office). TX Right to Life 0%, NARAL Pro-Choice TX 100%, PP Texas Votes 100%; voted against abortion ban/SB 8. Equality Texas A; opposes vouchers (No on SB 2 ESA, 2025); broke 2021 quorum to block SB 1; criticized Operation Lone Star/Eagle Pass; called for review of TX ICE cooperation; asked Abbott to veto permitless carry (HB 1927); NRA-ILA action-alert target. ACU TX 13%, YCT 9%.

profile.confidence_note: Web-verified 2026-06-19. Incumbent TX HD-48 (Austin/Travis) since 2006; advanced from 2026 Dem primary, faces Anthony Gupta (R) Nov 2026. Registered nurse; senior Appropriations member; Chair, Women's Health Caucus; leading reproductive-rights advocate.

donna-howard@TX.notes_append: Evidence finalize 2026-06-19: TX HD-48. Leading repro-rights advocate: opposed SB 22 and HB 16 'Born Alive' (led present-not-voting protest); filed HB 262 (judgment exception to abortion penalties); signed NARAL/PP 'Trust.Respect.Access.' agenda; Texas Alliance for Life 52%. Opposed vouchers (public-school-funding amendment on SB 2, 2025). Participated in 2021 quorum break blocking SB 1/SB 7 voting bill. Individual roll calls for SB 14 (marriage/trans), SB 4 (border), HB 1927 (carry) NOT confirmed -> left null rather than inferred from party.
